arts.ttl: Former Serie A star found dead in a hotel room at 43 as Cagliari pay tribute to club legend's 'professionalism, dedication and passion'
arts.sum: After growing up in the city, Capone would go on to graduate from the club's academy before becoming a regular feature in the Serie A side's midfield in the 2000s.

arts.ttl: Former Cagliari player Andrea Capone found dead in hotel
arts.sum: Tragic news has shaken the Italian football world as Andrea Capone, a former Cagliari player, was found lifeless in his room at Palazzo Tirso late this morning. The cause of death is not yet clear, but a head wound suggests a fatal fall may have occurred, possibly following a sudden illness. Emergency services arrived at the scene but could only confirm his passing. Calciomercato report how Andrea Capone, known for his development in Cagliari’s youth academy, is remembered for playing alongside notable teammates such as Esposito, Suazo, and Langella during his time with the Sardinian club.
